variants.subtitle: Choose your god. Walk their path. Forge your identity.

nodes.description: Align with Saradomin (Holy). While a shield and 1h melee weapon is equipped, your attack speed is halved (round down). Picking this locks the other gods until you reset the graph.
Align with Zamorak (Caster). Your spellbook-spell attack speed is halved (round down). Picking this locks the other gods until you reset the graph.
Align with Zaros (Summoner). Unlock 1 Guardian pet. Gain 35% XP in your current combat style for damage dealt by your pets and summons. Picking this locks the other gods until you reset the graph.
Align with Armadyl (Ranger). Your ranged attack speed is halved (round down). Picking this locks the other gods until you reset the graph.
Align with Guthix (Tank). -1 attack delay per hit taken. Reflect 3 + 1% of total defence to attackers. Picking this locks the other gods until you reset the graph.

Align with Bandos (Melee). Melee strikes hit harder but keep your weapon's normal attack speed — damage is scaled so DPS matches a halved swing timer. Picking this locks the other gods until you reset the graph.
Hammerdin hammers orbit around you, dealing damage to all enemies in range. Orbiting hammer max hit equals 25% of your prayer bonus.
While Smite is active, your damage dealt is increased by 0.35% per point of equipped prayer bonus.
Below 50 prayer points, gain a defence bonus per missing point. Above 50 prayer points, gain a damage bonus per excess point. (0.35% per point.)
Every spell you cast also fires 2 random elemental spells of your magic level. Echoes consume no runes and target the same enemy.

Every tile you walk off (up to 6) becomes a flame tile for 6 ticks, dealing 5% of your magic strength bonus to enemies on it per tick. Standing on your own flame tiles deals 1.5% max HP to you per tick.
Gain a spell — Forsaken Pact — that you can activate. While active, food cannot heal you, all spell damage +25%. Re-cast to cancel. Spell requires Magic 70 and 4 blood + 4 chaos runes per cast.
When you summon a thrall, you summon 2 of the same type, without consuming additional thrall summon slots.
Empower your boss pet. All your other summons feed your boss pet via a soulsplit projectile, granting +15% damage per active summon.
Sacrifice 30 max HP to empower pets and summons by +15% damage.
Ranged attacks halve damage mitigation. +2% damage per tile of distance from target (caps at 8 tiles).
Projectiles bounce once. Each bounce has a 13% chance to trigger a ranged echo.
Crossbow attacks have a 18% chance to roll their max hit.
Once per 3 seconds, when you next get hit, heal for the damage taken.
Take 35% less damage. One third of that mitigated damage is dealt to you over time as a bleed.
Your ranged hits apply a Wind Root stack to the target (max 5). Each stack gives +3% ranged damage to that target. Wind Roots last 10 seconds, refreshed on hit.
Gain a bag that holds up to 5 weapons. 15% chance on hit to instantly strike again with a random weapon from the bag.
Melee attack range increased by 6 tiles.
While below 50 HP and wielding a two-handed melee weapon, deal +15% damage.
Orbiting hammer max hit raised to 50% of prayer bonus.
Orbiting hammer max hit raised to 100% of prayer bonus.
Orbiting hammer max hit raised to 150% of prayer bonus.
Bonus HP equal to 33% of your prayer bonus. Max HP is capped at 250.
Bonus HP equal to 66% of your prayer bonus. Max HP is capped at 250.
Bonus HP equal to 100% of your prayer bonus. Max HP is capped at 250.
Below 25 prayer points, passive heal 1 HP per 5 ticks.
Above 75 prayer points, +25% prayer bonus.
Prayer points drain 50% slower.
Removes strike-tier spells from the chaos echo pool.
Removes bolt-tier spells from the chaos echo pool.
Removes blast-tier spells from the chaos echo pool.
Enemies on flame tiles take 7% of your magic strength bonus per tick.
Flame tiles last 9 ticks (up from 6).
Flame tiles no longer deal damage to you.
While Forsaken Pact is active, every spell cast sacrifices 7 HP and fires an extra Blood Blitz at the target.
Sacrificed HP per cast raised to 13. Healing from spells +10% additional.
Blood Blitz proc becomes Blood Barrage (AoE around target).
All summons +25% damage.
All summons attack 1 tick faster.
Each active summon grants +10 magic strength to you.
Per-summon channel bonus raised: 15% to 20%.
Boss pet attack speed -1 tick during conduit.
Boss pet gains +10% prayer penetration per active summon.
Cap raised to 50 max HP / +25% summon damage.
Cap stays at 50 max HP, conversion improves to +30% summon damage.
Heal for 1% of pets' and summons' damage dealt.
Distance bonus raised to +3% damage per tile (caps at 8 tiles).
After 5 consecutive hits on the same target, each subsequent hit has a 25% chance to deal 150% damage. Counter resets on proc.
Ignore line of sight (your shots can hit through obstacles and walls).
Bounce count raised to 2.
Ranged echo proc chance raised by 7%.
Each bounce has an additional independent chance for a ranged echo (effectively doubles proc rate).
The first crossbow shot at a target deals +50% damage. Re-arms when you switch targets.
Bolt special procs +20% chance.
Bolt specials deal +20% damage.
Renewal trigger also restores 1 prayer point.
Renewal trigger also restores 3 prayer points.
Renewal trigger also restores 5 prayer points.
Bark Skin damage reduction raised to 40%.
Bark Skin damage reduction raised to 45%.
Bark Skin damage reduction raised to 50%.
Wind Root stack cap raised from 5 to 8.
Switching targets while you have Wind Roots applied fires a thorn shockwave on the old target dealing typeless damage equal to your max hit.
While you have maximum Wind Roots on a target, the reflect damage from Edicts of Guthix dealt to that target is doubled.
Blindbag proc chance raised from 15% to 25%.
Blindbag proc hits can themselves trigger Blindbag.
Each weapon stored in your Blindbag adds +4% proc chance (cap 40% total).
For every tile between you and your target, your minimum melee hit is raised by 5% of your max hit.
Heal 1 HP on hit for every tile between you and your target.
Goliath's Reach range bonus increased from 6 to 8 tiles.
Berserker damage bonus increased by an additional +10% (total +25%).
15% chance to take no damage from a hit that would otherwise be lethal.
Unlocks the Reaver spell. Toggleable: while off, lifesteal heals you; while on, lifesteal is stored and released as bonus damage on every 3rd melee hit. Spell requires Magic 70 (no rune cost).
Unlocks the Momentum effect. While in combat with a ranged weapon, build stacks (max 10) that increase your damage. Stacks decay when you leave combat.
+7% ranged damage. Multiplies with Eye of Armadyl's distance bonus.
Each ranged attack against the same target adds 1 stack (max 100). +1% damage per 10 stacks (cap +10%). Resets on target switch, leaving combat, or death.
Kills with crossbows or ballistas restore 20% of your maximum HP.
Bolt effect proc chance increased by 10%.
Ranged attacks deal up to 20% of your max hit to up to 8 adjacent targets. No-op against single-target bosses with no adjacent NPCs.
Crossbow attack speed +6 ticks slower, but crossbow damage +350%.
Crossbow shots fire a secondary bolt at the target. The secondary bolt deals magic damage and freezes the target for 5 ticks.
Bolt special effect procs chain to 1 nearby enemy in multi-combat.
+3% ranged max hit.
+3% ranged max hit.
+20% damage with two-handed ranged weapons. Attack 1 tick slower while a two-handed ranged weapon is equipped.
Thrown weapons attack 1 tick faster.
+10 minimum hit while wielding a thrown weapon and any off-hand item.
+15% XP from ranged attacks.
+20% damage with longbow-class weapons.
Longbow-class weapons have a 33% chance per shot to attack 1 tick faster.
+2 ranged attack range tiles.
Bolt effect proc chance +10%.

+20 maximum HP base. Max HP is capped at 250.

+3% damage dealt by your pets and summons.
+3% damage dealt by your pets and summons.

Heal for 3% of damage dealt by your pets and summons.
Heal for 3% of damage dealt by your pets and summons.
Heal for 3% of damage dealt by your pets and summons.
Heal for 3% of damage dealt by your pets and summons.
Unlock the Imp summon as a separate companion — you command 2 Imps at once. They do NOT consume a thrall summon slot. Raises thrall summon cap by 1.
Unlock a second Guardian summon as a separate companion. The second Guardian does NOT consume a thrall summon slot. Raises thrall summon cap by 1.

Unlock the Resurrect Greater Thrall spells (Ghost, Skeleton, Zombie). Thrall summon cap = 1 (raised by other Legion meds). All three spells share the same requirements: Magic 76, 6 prayer points, plus blood, fire, and cosmic runes per cast.
Boss pet max hit +5% per active pet or summon.

Unlocks the Soul Surge spell. 30-second cooldown. Deals 5x5 AoE damage centered on your boss pet, scaling with the number of active pets and summons. Spell requires Magic 90 and 4 soul + 4 blood runes per cast.
Your boss pet always teleports adjacent to its target. Boss pet attack range is hard-capped at 2 tiles.
Pets and summons heal you for 6% of damage they deal.
Blood spells heal you for double the normal amount.

At <lt>50% HP, your summons attack 1 tick faster. Unlocks the Sanguine Sacrifice spell that toggles to halve your maximum HP — re-cast to release. Spell requires Magic 85, 35 blood runes, and 5 prayer points per cast.
+30% of your active style's XP for damage dealt by your pets and summons.
+30% of your active style's XP for damage dealt by your pets and summons.
Boss pet max hit +10%.
+20 maximum HP base. Max HP is capped at 250.
Blood spells heal +15%.
+3% magic max hit.
+3% magic max hit.
+5% blood spell damage.
+3% boss pet damage per active summon.
+25% style XP from summon damage.
One-handed melee weapons (or unarmed) deal +5% damage while more than two prayers are active.
+3% melee max hit.
+3% melee max hit.
+3% melee max hit.
+3% melee max hit.
+3% melee max hit.
+3% magic max hit.
+3% magic max hit.
Powered-staff hits against burning targets heal 1 HP.
+3% damage in melee, magic, and ranged.
+5% damage while wielding any off-hand item.
+3% damage in melee, magic, and ranged.
Elemental spells (fire, water, earth, air) deal +25% damage.
Elemental spells (air, water, earth, fire) deal +35% damage but take 1 extra tick to cast.
Each spellbook spell cast costs 15 HP. All magic attacks (including powered-staff) deal +25% damage with 2.5% lifesteal. The HP cost does not apply to powered-staff auto-attacks.
+15% magic max hit vs targets currently burning (any burn source).
Heal for 3% of the burn damage you deal.
Burn DoT damage you apply is doubled (any burn source).
+25 maximum HP. Max HP is capped at 250.

Unlock the Shadow Spike spell — a single-target shadow attack hitting 40-120, 30s cooldown, 15 HP cost. Appears on your spellbook (Standard, Ancient, or Zamorakian). Spell requires Magic 75 (no rune cost).

Unlock the Infernus spell — a single-target flaming rock hitting 40-100 and igniting the target with a damage-over-time burn (5 ticks), 30s cooldown, 15 HP cost. Appears on your spellbook (Standard, Ancient, or Zamorakian). Spell requires Magic 80 (no rune cost).
Your Searing Cast, Volatile Staff and Infernus burns last +1 extra tick (6 hits instead of 5) for the same total damage.
Fire spells have a 10% chance to burn the target for 35% of your magic strength bonus.
+5% magic max hit vs targets currently burning.
+5% magic max hit vs targets currently frozen.
Heal for 3% of all damage you deal.
Powered staves attack speed halved (round up).
Powered staves have a 10% chance to burn the target for 35% of your magic strength bonus.

Unlock the Zamorakian spellbook (ancient and elemental spells) plus the Heretic's Meteor combat spell. Casting Shadow Spike reduces the cooldown of Infernus and Heretic's Meteor by 15 seconds; casting Infernus reduces the cooldown of Shadow Spike and Heretic's Meteor by 15 seconds. Heretic's Meteor requires Magic 95 (no rune cost), 60-second cooldown.

All pets and summons gain infinite attack range and bypass line-of-sight checks. Boss NPC kills grant 5 soul shards; spend 25 soul shards on the Greater Imp spell (unlocked by this capstone) to summon a Greater Imp minion. Spell requires Magic 90 and 25 soul shards per cast (no runes).

All ranged weapons have a base attack range of 10 tiles (applied before other ranged range modifiers, letting all weapons cap out distance). Each ranged attack has a 10% chance to fire a ranged echo for up to the same damage; ranged echoes can chain into further echoes (capped at 3 per swing).
Melee hits restore 1 prayer point. Kills restore 5 prayer points.
Defender-class weapons count as shields for all shield-conditional effects (starting perk, +damage smalls, etc.).
Every 5th attack fires a Spear of Light at your target with a max hit equal to 50% of your prayer bonus.
Every 3 points of prayer bonus add 1 to your defence stat.
Passive: restore 1 prayer point every 5 ticks.
Melee damage scales +0.2% per point of prayer bonus.
Defence stats from equipped shields are multiplied by 5.
+1% damage per active prayer.
+1% damage per active prayer.
While wielding a shield, take 5% less damage.
While wielding a shield, take 5% less damage.
Prayer drain rate reduced by 15%.
One-handed melee weapons (or unarmed) deal +5% damage.
One-handed melee weapons (or unarmed) attack 1 tick faster.
+2% damage per active prayer.
Gain access to the Omni prayer which combines all 3 protection prayers simultaneously. While Smite is active, orbiting Hammerdin hammers deal +15% damage.
Every time an incoming hit deals 0 damage to you (prayer block, dodge, defence roll), restore 2 prayer points and 2 HP.
25% chance on melee hit to flurry — your next melee attack fires 1 tick sooner.
Flurry proc chance raised by an additional +25% (total 50%) — your next melee attack fires 1 tick sooner.
Melee hits have a 10% chance to apply a 3-tick bleed.
+1 melee attack range while wielding a two-handed weapon.
Minimum melee hit raised by +5 for every tile between you and your target.
Two-handed melee hits at more than 1 tile of range have a +15% chance to trigger a melee echo.
+8% chance on melee hit to trigger a melee echo while wielding a two-handed weapon.
Two-handed melee echo chance raised by an additional +8%.
Two-handed melee echo chance raised by an additional +8%.
+5% melee damage per tile of target size (e.g. +15% vs a 3x3 boss).
Minimum melee hit raised by +1 for every 10 HP missing.
+2% lifesteal on melee hits.
+2% lifesteal on melee hits.
Melee weapons with an attack speed slower than 5 ticks have their attack speed capped at 5 ticks.
+25% prayer penetration on melee hits.
While wielding a dual-wield melee weapon (Torag's hammers, Infernal tecpatl, etc.), each individual hit rolls for a melee echo instead of just once per attack.

Once per 2 minutes, channel Bandos's fury and enter Avatar Mode for 20 seconds. During Avatar Mode: melee range +6, melee attack speed -1 tick, +10% melee lifesteal, +10% melee echo proc chance, and melee echoes can themselves trigger melee echoes. Spell requires Magic 80 and 5 blood + 5 soul runes per cast.
Food is no longer consumed when you eat it (excludes Olympian Feast).
Each time you reflect damage to an attacker, heal yourself for 1 HP.
+8% damage while wielding any off-hand item and attacking from at least 2 tiles away.
Recoil rings, suffering rings, and echo boots deal additional damage equal to 1% of your total defence stat.
When you take damage, 15% of the pre-mitigation damage is reflected back at the attacker (typeless).
While a shield is equipped, each incoming hit has a 0.1% chance per Defence level to be fully reflected back to the attacker (you take no damage). Boosts count; prestige does not.
Your in-combat HP regen rate is doubled (1 HP every 6 ticks becomes 1 HP every 3 ticks). Kills also restore 5 HP.
+5% ranged max hit while attacking from at least 2 tiles away.
+5 ranged minimum hit while wielding any off-hand item.
Reflected damage has a 15% chance to apply a 3-tick bleed dealing an additional 50% of the reflected amount as damage over time.
Each time you take damage, heal 2 HP.
Kills restore 5 prayer points.
HP regen rate increased by 1 HP per 5 ticks.
HP regen rate increased by 1 HP per 5 ticks.
Damage taken reduced by 3%.
Damage taken reduced by an additional 3% (total -6%).
The reflect from Edicts of Guthix is permanently increased by 50% (1.5x damage). Damage taken from any single source is capped at 25% of your max HP (you can no longer be one-shot).

variants.subtitle: Unlock valuable perks with your clue points.

nodes.description: +5% clue drop rate from monster kills and +5% clue drop rate from skilling activities.
+6% chance for monster kills to drop a clue scroll. Stacks to rank 2 for +12% total.
+3% chance for monster kills to drop a clue scroll. Stacks to rank 3 for +9% total.
